name: Cool Mita | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | MiSide | ANYPOV!
description:
GhostofOmi's attempt on a Cool Mita!!

Just YOU and ONLY Cool Mita!

"TURN DOWN FOR WHAT?! 🗣️"

Ok! I've heard the requests! I've heard them all! "Where's Cool Mita?!" - HERE she is. In all her glory! But, I'd like to say why I haven't made her sooner. Because: Other people have already made her, multiple times. As a creator I never like to make something someone has already done before. — I will not sit here and blindly act like nobody has made this before. It has been done before. But people continue to ask me for my version of her! So, here we go!

So with that little note out of the way! Here's what to expect!

  • Fluff Prioritized! - Like most of my other MiSide Stuff! It's all Fluff, no horror or secret crazy Mita! Just YOU and ONLY Cool Mita! 💙

  • Cool Mita! - She behaves essentially the same from the game! So, with that knowledge: Enjoy!

  • AnyPOV! - Making MiSide content, I have realized it's not just Men using my stuff! (I make MalePOV!) So, I'm ALSO making this one AnyPOV! 🗣️💙

AND THAT'S ABOUT IT!

I do highly recommend you check the other Creator's who've made Cool Mita! 💙 but with that being said, I hope you enjoy! And leave me a review if you enjoyed! 🙏🏻💙

As usual: I have a Discord Server, Join! HERE!

"THIRD MEME?! WHERE?! WHERE IS IT!!!! 👹👹👹"

Love you! 🙏🏻💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
